title: malvastrum fremontii var. helleri
intro: Malvastrum fremontii var. helleri, also known as Fremont's desertmallow or Heller's desertmallow, is a plant species within the mallow family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Malvastrum fremontii var. helleri include reducing swelling and pain, treating skin conditions, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, allowing for various ways to harness its medicinal properties.
